title.v: duyệt, hủy chi tiết phiếu nhu cầu

items.key: status = '1' and ma_nk in (select ma_nk from v20dmctnk where ma_ct = @@id and (lstuser = '' or charindex(rtrim(@@userName) + ',', replace(lstuser, ' ', '') + ',') > 0))

command.text:
declare @stt_rec0 char(3), @sl_duyet numeric(18,3), @ghi_chu_ct nvarchar(1023), @tag1 bit, @tag2 bit, @c1 char(6), @c2 char(6), @maxNum int, @p int, @lastrow int, @lastUser int, @createdUser int, @userID3 int select @userID3 = user_id3 from m91$$partition$current where stt_rec = @stt_rec select @maxNum = max(line_nbr) from @d91 select @lastrow = 0, @lastUser = 0, @createdUser = 0 select @p = min(line_nbr) from @d91 while @p is not null begin if @p = @maxNum set @lastrow = 1 select @stt_rec0 = stt_rec0, @sl_duyet = sl_duyet, @ghi_chu_ct = ghi_chu, @tag1 = tag1, @tag2 = tag2 from @d91 where line_nbr = @p if @tag1 = 1 exec rs_PostPRAuthorize 2, 1, @@userID, @stt_rec, @@sysDatabaseName, @@language, '', @stt_rec0, @sl_duyet, @ghi_chu_ct, @lastrow, default, default, default, &VoucherApproveLog; else if @tag2 = 1 exec rs_PostPRAuthorize 2, 2, @@userID, @stt_rec, @@sysDatabaseName, @@language, '', @stt_rec0, @sl_duyet, @ghi_chu_ct, @lastrow, default, default, default, &VoucherApproveLog; select @p = min(line_nbr) from @d91 where line_nbr > @p end
declare @t_duyet varchar(16), @t_huy varchar(16), @t_dong varchar(16), @$status varchar(32), @$u_status0 varchar(32), @ownerID int select @t_duyet = ltrim(t_duyet), @t_huy = ltrim(t_huy), @t_dong = ltrim(t_dong), @$status = status, @$u_status0 = u_status0, @ownerID = user_id0 from m91$$partition$current where stt_rec = @stt_rec
declare @invoke nvarchar(4000), @mailUser int, @xtype int, @isChange bit, @role varchar(32), @categoryApprove varchar(32) select @invoke = '', @isChange = 0 if @$status in ('1', '2', '9') begin if exists(select 1 from e91$000000 where stt_rec = @stt_rec and stt = (select max(stt) from a91$000000 where stt_rec = @stt_rec)) or (@$u_status0 = '1' and exists(select 1 from d91$$partition$current where stt_rec = @stt_rec and so_luong <> sl_duyet)) select @isChange = 1
exec FastBusiness$App$GetApprovalRole '1', @@id, @@userID, @dept_id, @ma_nt, @t_tien_nt, @$u_status0, @@language, @kieu_duyet, @categoryApprove output, @role output if @$u_status0 = '1' or not exists (select 1 from dmquyenct where ma_quyen = @role and status = @$u_status0 and notify_mail_yn = '1' and kieu_duyet = @categoryApprove) select @userID3 = 0 if not exists (select 1 from dmquyenct where ma_quyen = @role and status = @$u_status0 and created_mail_yn = '1' and kieu_duyet = @categoryApprove) select @ownerID = 0
create table #mail(id int, stt_rec char(13), userID int, xtype int) insert into #mail exec FastBusiness$App$GetApprovalMailList @stt_rec, 'm91$$partition$current', '1', @@id, '@@sysDatabaseName', @userID3, @isChange, @ownerID
select @p = min(id) from #mail while @p is not null begin select @mailUser = userID, @xtype = xtype from #mail where id = @p select @invoke = @invoke + case when @invoke = '' then '' else '&' + char(255) + ';' end + 'Message.Message.SendPrivate(' + '&MessageID;' + ',' + @stt_rec + ',' + '@@appDatabaseName' + char(255) + '@@sysDatabaseName' + ',' + @ma_md + ',' + rtrim(@mailUser)+ ',' + rtrim(@xtype) + ')' select @p = min(id) from #mail where id > @p end &PostNotify; end
select '' field, '' as message, @invoke as invoke, 'updateBrowse(this,' + @t_duyet + ',' + @t_huy + ',' + @t_dong + ');' return
